task_completion.description: Verify the client logo was moved to a web-accessible location within the WordPress directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (e.g., cp, mv) or a file manager showing 'client-logo.png' being placed inside a directory like '/var/www/html/wordpress/wp-content/' or an images subfolder within it.

task_completion.description: Verify a Must-Use plugin file was created for the customizations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a new .php file being created or edited inside the '/var/www/html/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the login logo URL is customized to point to http://localhost/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PHP code in the mu-plugin file hooking into 'login_headerurl' and returning 'http://localhost/', or a browser hovering over the login logo showing 'http://localhost/' as the link destination.

task_completion.description: Verify the body.login background color is set to #1e293b.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress login page viewed in a browser showing a dark slate/blue background, OR PHP code in the mu-plugin injecting CSS 'body.login { background-color: #1e293b; }'.

task_completion.description: Verify the default WordPress logo is replaced with the client logo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress login page viewed in a browser showing the custom 'client-logo.png' instead of the default WordPress 'W' logo, OR PHP code injecting CSS to change the '.login h1 a' background-image to the new logo.

integrity.description: Ensure WordPress core files (like wp-login.php) were not modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor should not show 'wp-login.php' or other core WordPress files being edited. All code changes should be in the mu-plugins directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent tested the login page on the actual local web server.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the login page with a URL starting with 'http://localhost' or 'http://127.0.0.1', not a 'file://' URL or a static HTML mock.

integrity.description: Ensure customizations were made exclusively via the mu-plugins system.
integrity.visual_evidence: No edits should be visible in the active theme's 'functions.php' file; all customization code must be within the 'mu-plugins' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target background color for the login page is #1e293b (dark blue/slate). The custom logo filename is client-logo.png.
